# Test fixtures

## `healthcare_subsample.csv`

**SYNTHETIC — NOT real BRFSS data.** This fixture is seed-generated by
[`_generate_healthcare_fixture.py`](_generate_healthcare_fixture.py) to reproduce the
**direction and approximate magnitude** of the published NHANES→BRFSS fairness finding —
elderly (age ≥ 60) AUC < young AUC, gap ≈ 0.135 — from the diabetes paper
(IEEE CIPHER 2026, DOI 10.1109/CIPHER70417.2026.11523789).

It is **not** real survey data, **not** the output of the published model, and does **not**
reproduce the full published run: the published significance (p < 0.001) was computed on
n = 1,285,783, whereas this fixture is ~1,200 synthetic rows. Its only purpose is to
**regression-test the audit pipeline** — that `HealthcareFairnessAudit` correctly detects
and quantifies a known-direction subgroup AUC gap.

Realized values (seed `20260626`): young AUC ≈ 0.764, elderly AUC ≈ 0.631, gap ≈ 0.133,
Bonferroni-adjusted p ≈ 7×10⁻⁶. The regression test asserts the gap within a tolerance band
and significance at the conservative threshold p < 0.01. To regenerate:

```bash
python tests/fixtures/_generate_healthcare_fixture.py
```
